name: Tempeh Stir Fry
steps: Slice tempeh into thin strips and pat dry
Mix soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, and cornstarch in a bowl
Heat oil in a wok over high heat
Add tempeh and cook 3-4 minutes until golden and crispy
Add garlic and ginger, stir for 30 seconds
Add broccoli and bell pepper, stir fry 4 minutes
Pour sauce over everything and toss to coat
Garnish with green onion and serve immediately

name: Edamame Quinoa Power Bowl
steps: Cook quinoa in 2 cups water for 12 minutes until water is absorbed
Steam frozen edamame in microwave for 3 minutes
Whisk soy sauce, sesame oil, lime juice, and sriracha together
Fluff quinoa and divide into bowls
Top with edamame, cucumber, and avocado
Drizzle dressing over bowl and sprinkle sesame seeds

name: Lentil and Spinach Dal
steps: Rinse red lentils under cold water
Heat olive oil in a pot over medium heat
Add garlic and ginger, cook 1 minute until fragrant
Add cumin, turmeric, and garam masala, stir 30 seconds
Add lentils, canned tomatoes, and 2 cups water
Bring to boil then simmer 15 minutes until lentils are soft
Stir in coconut milk and spinach until wilted
Season with salt and serve over rice or with naan

name: Chickpea Tikka Masala
steps: Dice onion and mince garlic and ginger
Heat oil in a large pan over medium-high heat
Add garlic, ginger, and all spices, stir 1 minute
Add canned tomatoes and simmer 5 minutes
Drain and rinse chickpeas, add to pan
Stir in coconut cream and simmer 8 minutes
Garnish with cilantro and serve with rice or naan

name: Tofu Scramble
steps: Press tofu between paper towels to remove moisture
Crumble tofu and mix with turmeric, nutritional yeast, garlic powder, and onion powder
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat
Add diced bell pepper and cook 3 minutes
Add tofu mixture and cook 5 minutes stirring occasionally
Add spinach and soy sauce, stir until wilted
Season with black salt and serve immediately

name: Black Bean Sweet Potato Tacos
steps: Dice sweet potato small and microwave 5 minutes until tender
Heat a skillet, add beans and sweet potato
Season with cumin, smoked paprika, and garlic powder
Warm tortillas in a dry pan 30 seconds each side
Top with sliced avocado, salsa, cilantro, and a squeeze of lime

name: Seitan and Broccoli
steps: Mix soy sauce, sesame oil, cornstarch, and water for sauce
Heat oil in a wok over high heat
Add seitan and cook 3 minutes until slightly crispy
Add garlic and ginger, stir 30 seconds
Add broccoli and stir fry 4 minutes
Pour sauce over and toss to coat
Sprinkle sesame seeds and serve over rice

name: Hemp Seed Smoothie Bowl
steps: Blend frozen banana, spinach, and almond milk until very smooth
Pour into a bowl - mixture should be thick
Top with hemp seeds, chia seeds, and granola
Drizzle with almond butter and a touch of maple syrup

name: Spicy Peanut Noodles with Tofu
steps: Cook rice noodles according to package directions then drain
Press and cube tofu, pan fry in oil until golden on all sides about 8 minutes
Whisk peanut butter, soy sauce, lime juice, sriracha, sesame oil, garlic, and ginger
Add a splash of water to loosen sauce if needed
Top with crispy tofu, sliced cucumber, and green onion

name: Vegan Protein Smoothie
steps: Add almond milk and protein powder to blender first
Add frozen banana, almond butter, and cocoa powder
Add chia seeds and maple syrup
Blend on high for 60 seconds until completely smooth
Add ice and blend again for 30 seconds
Pour into a glass and serve immediately

name: Greek Yogurt Chicken Bowl
steps: Slice chicken breast thin and season with oregano, salt, and pepper
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat
Cook chicken 4-5 minutes each side until cooked through
Mix Greek yogurt with garlic, lemon juice, and dill
Halve cherry tomatoes and slice cucumber
Assemble bowl with yogurt base, chicken, tomatoes, and cucumber
Drizzle with olive oil and serve

name: Tuna Avocado Wrap
steps: Drain tuna and flake into a bowl
Mash avocado with lemon juice, salt, and pepper
Mix avocado into tuna along with dijon mustard
Finely dice celery and red onion and fold in
Lay tortilla flat and spread tuna mixture down the center
Add a handful of mixed greens on top
Roll tightly and cut in half diagonally

name: Egg White Veggie Scramble
steps: Whisk egg whites with a pinch of salt and pepper
Dice bell pepper and halve cherry tomatoes
Heat olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat
Cook bell pepper 2 minutes then add garlic
Pour in egg whites and let set for 30 seconds
Add spinach and tomatoes, fold gently as eggs cook
Remove from heat and top with crumbled feta and fresh basil

name: Salmon and Asparagus
steps: Season salmon with salt, pepper, and lemon zest
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat
Place salmon skin-side up and cook 4 minutes
Flip salmon and add asparagus to pan
Add butter, garlic, and capers, baste salmon with butter
Cook another 4 minutes until salmon is opaque
Squeeze lemon over everything and garnish with dill

name: Turkey Lettuce Wraps
steps: Heat oil in a pan over medium-high heat
Add ground turkey and cook 6-7 minutes breaking up as it cooks
Add garlic and ginger, stir 1 minute
Add soy sauce, hoisin, and sesame oil
Stir in diced water chestnuts and cook 2 more minutes
Fill each leaf with turkey mixture and top with green onion, sriracha, and lime

name: Shakshuka
steps: Dice onion and bell pepper, mince garlic
Heat olive oil in a deep skillet over medium heat
Cook onion and pepper 5 minutes until soft
Add garlic, cumin, paprika, and cayenne, stir 1 minute
Add canned tomatoes and simmer 8 minutes until slightly thickened
Make wells in the sauce and crack eggs into each well
Cover and cook 5-6 minutes until whites set but yolks are runny
Top with crumbled feta and parsley

name: Shrimp and Avocado Tacos
steps: Peel and devein shrimp, pat dry
Season with cumin, smoked paprika, garlic, salt, and pepper
Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat
Cook shrimp 2 minutes per side until pink and curled
Warm tortillas in a dry pan
Mash avocado with lime juice and salt
Top with shrimp, shredded cabbage, sour cream, and cilantro

name: Cottage Cheese Berry Bowl
steps: Scoop cottage cheese into a bowl
Sprinkle granola, chia seeds, and walnuts

name: Beef and Broccoli Stir Fry
steps: Slice beef thin against the grain and toss with cornstarch
Mix soy sauce, oyster sauce, sesame oil, brown sugar, and beef broth
Heat oil in a wok over very high heat until smoking
Add beef in one layer and sear 2 minutes then stir fry 1 minute
Add garlic, ginger, then broccoli, stir fry 4 minutes
Return beef, pour sauce over and toss everything together
Cook 2 more minutes until sauce thickens

name: Canned Tuna Pasta
steps: Cook pasta in salted boiling water until al dente
Reserve half cup pasta water before draining
Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat
Add garlic and chili flakes, cook 1 minute
Add halved cherry tomatoes and cook 4 minutes until soft
Drain tuna and add to pan along with capers
Add drained pasta and splash of pasta water
Toss everything together, add lemon juice and parsley

name: Avocado Toast with Microgreens
steps: Toast sourdough bread until golden and crispy
Mash avocado with lemon juice and a pinch of sea salt
Top with a handful of microgreens
Sprinkle everything bagel seasoning and chili flakes
Drizzle with a tiny bit of olive oil

name: Mango Coconut Chia Pudding
steps: Whisk together coconut milk, maple syrup, and vanilla extract
Stir in chia seeds until well combined
Let sit 5 minutes then stir again to break up clumps
Top with mango, shredded coconut, lime zest, and mint

name: Roasted Red Pepper Hummus Wrap
steps: Spread a generous layer of hummus on the tortilla
Layer spinach leaves across the center
Add sliced roasted red peppers, cucumber, and olives
Add thinly sliced red onion and sun-dried tomatoes
Squeeze lemon juice over the filling
Roll tightly tucking in the ends

name: Vegan Pad Thai
steps: Soak rice noodles in hot water 10 minutes then drain
Press and cube tofu, pan fry until golden
Mix tamarind paste, soy sauce, brown sugar, and sesame oil for sauce
Heat oil in wok over high heat
Add drained noodles and sauce, toss continuously for 3 minutes
Add tofu and bean sprouts, toss 2 more minutes
Serve topped with peanuts, green onion, chili flakes, and lime

name: Miso Soup with Tofu
steps: Bring 4 cups water to a simmer
Add dashi powder and stir to dissolve
Cut silken tofu into small cubes
Soak wakame seaweed in cold water 5 minutes then drain
Reduce heat to low - do not boil after adding miso
Dissolve miso paste in a ladle of broth then stir back into pot
Ladle into bowls and top with sliced green onion and sesame oil

name: Sweet Potato Black Bean Bowl
steps: Cook quinoa in 1.5 cups water for 12 minutes
Dice sweet potato small and toss with olive oil, cumin, and paprika
Microwave sweet potato 6-7 minutes until tender
Heat black beans in a pan with cumin and salt
Top with sweet potato, black beans, avocado, and jalapeno
Finish with salsa, cilantro, and a generous squeeze of lime

name: Coconut Curry Lentil Soup
steps: Dice onion and mince garlic and ginger
Heat oil in a pot over medium heat
Cook onion until softened about 4 minutes
Add garlic, ginger, curry powder, and turmeric, stir 1 minute
Add tomato paste and cook 2 minutes
Add rinsed lentils, coconut milk, and vegetable broth
Bring to a boil then simmer 15 minutes until lentils are tender
Stir in spinach and squeeze lime juice over before serving

name: Paneer Tikka
steps: Mix yogurt, lemon juice, garam masala, cumin, turmeric, chili powder, garlic, and ginger
Marinate paneer in yogurt mixture for at least 10 minutes
Cut bell pepper and onion into chunks
Thread paneer and vegetables onto skewers alternating
Cook under broiler or on grill pan 4-5 minutes per side
Brush with oil halfway through cooking
Garnish with cilantro and serve with mint chutney

name: Caprese Pasta
steps: Cook pasta in salted boiling water until al dente
Reserve some pasta water then drain
Heat olive oil in pan, add garlic and cook 1 minute
Add halved cherry tomatoes and cook 3 minutes until they burst
Add drained pasta and a splash of pasta water
Remove from heat and tear fresh mozzarella over pasta
Add torn basil leaves and toss gently
Drizzle with balsamic glaze and olive oil, season well

name: Veggie Fried Rice
steps: Use day-old cold rice for best results
Dice carrot small and mince garlic and ginger
Heat oil in a wok over very high heat
Add garlic and ginger, stir 30 seconds
Push everything to the side and scramble eggs in the center
Add rice and break up any clumps, stir fry everything together
Add frozen peas, soy sauce, and sesame oil, toss constantly for 3 minutes

name: Spicy Tuna Rice Bowl
steps: Mix drained tuna with sriracha, mayonnaise, and soy sauce
Place warm rice in a bowl
Top rice with spicy tuna mixture
Arrange cucumber, avocado, and edamame around the bowl
Sprinkle sesame seeds and green onion

name: Banana Oat Protein Pancakes
steps: Mash banana in a bowl until smooth
Blend oats until they become flour
Mix banana, eggs, Greek yogurt, oat flour, vanilla, cinnamon, and baking powder
Let batter rest 5 minutes to thicken
Heat butter in non-stick pan over medium heat
Pour small rounds of batter and cook 2-3 minutes until bubbles form
Stack and serve with maple syrup and fresh berries

name: Honey Garlic Salmon
steps: Mix honey, soy sauce, minced garlic, and lemon juice for glaze
Pat salmon dry and season with salt and pepper
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat
Flip salmon and pour glaze over top
Add butter and thyme to pan and baste salmon

name: Mushroom Lentil Bolognese
steps: Cook pasta in salted water until al dente
Finely chop mushrooms, onion, carrot, and garlic
Heat olive oil in large pan over medium-high heat
Add mushrooms and cook 4 minutes until browned
Add tomato paste and cook 2 minutes
Pour in red wine and let reduce 1 minute
Add canned tomatoes and lentils, simmer 8 minutes
Toss with pasta and top with parmesan

name: Chicken Caesar Wrap
steps: Season chicken with garlic powder, salt, and olive oil
Cook chicken in skillet over medium-high heat 5-6 minutes per side
Chop romaine and toss with Caesar dressing and lemon juice
Warm tortillas in a dry pan 30 seconds
Layer lettuce, sliced chicken, parmesan, and croutons on tortilla
Roll tightly and cut in half

name: Loaded Sweet Potato
steps: Pierce sweet potato all over with a fork
Microwave on high for 7-8 minutes until tender throughout
Heat black beans with cumin and smoked paprika
Cut sweet potato open and fluff inside with fork
Add shredded cheese so it melts from the heat
Top with Greek yogurt, sliced avocado, cilantro, and lime

name: Smoked Salmon Bagel
steps: Spread cream cheese generously on both halves
Layer smoked salmon on the bottom half
Add thin slices of cucumber and red onion
Add fresh dill and a squeeze of lemon juice
Top with arugula and sprinkle everything bagel seasoning
Press top half on and serve

name: Halloumi Veggie Wrap
steps: Slice zucchini, bell pepper, and red onion
Toss vegetables with olive oil and season well
Heat a grill pan over high heat
Grill vegetables 3-4 minutes per side until charred
Grill halloumi 2 minutes per side until golden
Layer vegetables, halloumi, mint, and pomegranate seeds
Squeeze lemon over and roll tightly

name: Spinach Ricotta Pasta
steps: Cook pasta in well-salted boiling water until al dente
Reserve 1 cup pasta water before draining
Heat olive oil in pan over medium heat
Add spinach and wilt about 2 minutes
Mix ricotta with lemon zest, nutmeg, salt, and pepper
Add pasta to pan with spinach and garlic
Add ricotta mixture and enough pasta water to create a creamy sauce
Finish with grated parmesan and a drizzle of olive oil

name: Cheese Quesadilla with Guacamole
steps: Mash avocados with lime juice, diced red onion, jalapeno, and cilantro
Season guacamole with salt and set aside
Heat a dry skillet over medium heat
Place tortilla in pan and sprinkle cheese over half
Fold tortilla in half and press gently
Cook 2-3 minutes per side until golden and cheese is melted
Serve with guacamole, sour cream, and salsa

name: Chicken and Vegetable Soup
steps: Pull and shred chicken off rotisserie chicken
Heat broth in a large pot over medium-high heat
Add onion, carrot, celery, and garlic, simmer 8 minutes
Add egg noodles and cook according to package
Simmer 5 more minutes until noodles are tender
Season with salt and pepper, garnish with fresh parsley

name: Pesto Zucchini Noodles
steps: Spiralize zucchini into noodles or use a vegetable peeler
Pat zucchini noodles dry with paper towels
Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat
Add zucchini noodles and toss 2 minutes - do not overcook
Remove from heat and toss with pesto
Add halved cherry tomatoes and lemon juice
Top with toasted pine nuts and shaved parmesan

name: French Omelette
steps: Crack eggs into a bowl and whisk vigorously with salt and white pepper
Grate gruyere cheese and chop chives
Heat butter in a non-stick pan over medium-high heat until foaming
Pour in eggs and immediately start stirring with a spatula
Keep stirring while shaking pan creating small curds
When eggs are just set but still glossy stop stirring
Add cheese and chives down the center
Roll omelette in the pan into a cylinder shape
Slide onto plate with seam-side down

name: Butternut Squash Soup
steps: Dice onion and mince garlic and ginger
Heat olive oil in a pot over medium heat
Add garlic, ginger, cumin, nutmeg, and cinnamon, stir 1 minute
Add squash puree and vegetable broth, stir to combine
Bring to a simmer and cook 10 minutes
Stir in coconut milk and blend until smooth
Season with salt and ladle into bowls
Top with pumpkin seeds and a drizzle of coconut milk

name: High Protein Greek Salad
steps: Dice cucumber and halve cherry tomatoes
Combine chickpeas, cucumber, tomatoes, olives, and red onion in a bowl
Whisk olive oil, lemon juice, and oregano together
Pour dressing over salad and toss
Top with crumbled feta and fresh mint
Serve with a side of Greek yogurt

name: Mushroom Tacos
steps: Season with smoked paprika, cumin, garlic, oil, salt, and pepper
Heat a skillet over high heat
Cook mushrooms 5-6 minutes until caramelized and juicy
Warm corn tortillas in dry pan
Fill tortillas with mushrooms and cabbage
Top with sliced avocado, vegan sour cream, cilantro, and lime

name: Spiced Roasted Chickpeas
steps: Drain and rinse chickpeas, pat completely dry with paper towels
Toss with olive oil and all spices plus nutritional yeast
Spread in a single layer on a baking sheet
Roast 20 minutes shaking halfway through until crispy
Let cool 5 minutes as they will crisp more as they cool
Serve as a snack or on top of salads

name: Cucumber Gazpacho
steps: Add cucumber, avocado, vegetable broth, and garlic to blender
Add lime juice, mint, and jalapeno
Chill or serve immediately over ice
Drizzle with olive oil and garnish with mint

name: Miso Glazed Eggplant
steps: Cut eggplant in half lengthwise and score flesh in a crosshatch pattern
Mix miso, mirin, sake, and sugar together for glaze
Brush cut side of eggplant with sesame oil
Place cut side down in a hot skillet, cook 5 minutes
Flip and brush miso glaze generously over cut side
Cover and cook until tender about 8 minutes
Broil 2 minutes until glaze is caramelized
Sprinkle sesame seeds and green onion

name: Beef and Broccoli Stir Fry
steps: Slice beef thin against the grain and toss with cornstarch
Mix soy sauce, oyster sauce, sesame oil, brown sugar, and beef broth
Heat oil in a wok over very high heat until smoking
Add beef in one layer and sear 2 minutes then stir fry 1 minute
Add garlic, ginger, then broccoli, stir fry 4 minutes
Return beef, pour sauce over and toss everything together
Cook 2 more minutes until sauce thickens

name: Grilled Chicken Breast
steps: Pound chicken breast to even thickness.
Mix olive oil, garlic powder, paprika, salt, and pepper.
Heat grill or pan over medium-high heat.
Squeeze lemon over top and rest 3 minutes before serving.

name: Tuna Steak Sear
steps: Mix soy sauce, sesame oil, garlic, and ginger.
Heat cast iron pan very hot.
Sear tuna 90 seconds per side for medium-rare.
Top with sesame seeds and green onion.

name: Turkey Breast Cutlets
steps: Season with Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper.
Add garlic and lemon zest to olive oil.
Baste with garlic oil while cooking.

name: Salmon Fillet with Dill
steps: Pat salmon dry, season with salt.
Melt butter in pan over medium-high heat.
Place salmon skin-side up, cook 4 minutes.
Add lemon juice, dill, and capers.
Spoon butter over fish and serve.

name: Beef Tenderloin Strips
steps: Season generously with salt and pepper.
Add rosemary and garlic to olive oil.

name: Shrimp Stir Fry
steps: Mix soy sauce, garlic, ginger, and sesame oil.
Heat wok or pan over high heat.
Pour sauce over and toss to coat.

name: Chicken Thigh Skillet
steps: Pat chicken dry and season with spices.

name: Ground Turkey Power Bowl
steps: Brown ground turkey in olive oil.
Cook until turkey is no longer pink.

name: Cod with Lemon Herb
steps: Season cod with salt and pepper.
Heat olive oil in pan over medium-high.
Add garlic, lemon juice, white wine to pan.
Pour over fish and garnish with parsley.

name: Beef and Broccoli
steps: Slice steak thin against the grain.
Toss with cornstarch and soy sauce.
Stir-fry broccoli with garlic and ginger.
Add steak back with oyster sauce.

name: Tilapia Tacos
steps: Season tilapia with chili powder and cumin.
Cook in pan 3-4 minutes per side.
Layer cabbage, fish, and sour cream.

name: Chicken Marsala
steps: Pound chicken thin and dust with flour.
Add marsala wine and broth, simmer 3 minutes.

name: Pork Tenderloin Medallions
steps: Season with salt, pepper, and rosemary.
Heat oil in pan over medium-high.
Add Dijon, reduce to sauce. Serve over pork.

name: Egg White Scramble
steps: Crumble feta over top and serve.

name: Tuna and White Bean Salad
steps: Combine tuna and beans in bowl.
Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice.

name: Greek Chicken Souvlaki
steps: Marinate in yogurt, lemon, garlic, and oregano 10 minutes.

name: Salmon Rice Bowl
steps: Sprinkle sesame seeds and torn nori.

name: Turkey Meatballs
steps: Mix turkey, egg, breadcrumbs, garlic, and parsley.
Brown meatballs in oil, 2 minutes per side.

name: Steak and Eggs
steps: Season steak generously with salt and pepper.
Cook steak 3-4 minutes per side for medium.
In same pan, fry eggs in butter.
Serve steak alongside eggs with hot sauce.

name: Chicken Tikka Kebabs
steps: Mix yogurt, tikka paste, lemon, garlic, and ginger.
Garnish with cilantro and lemon wedge.

name: Seitan Stir Fry
steps: Mix soy sauce, hoisin, sesame oil.
Pour sauce over and toss 2 minutes.

name: Tempeh Tacos
steps: Add taco seasoning and 2 tbsp water.
Top with avocado, salsa, and cilantro.

name: Edamame Power Bowl
steps: Top with nori strips and sesame seeds.

name: Lentil Walnut Bolognese
steps: Pulse walnuts coarsely in food processor.
Add lentils, walnuts, and tomato sauce.

name: Tofu Scramble Burrito
steps: Add tofu, turmeric, black salt, nutritional yeast.

name: Chickpea and Spinach Curry
steps: Add diced tomatoes and cook 3 minutes.
Stir in spinach and cook until wilted.

name: Black Bean Protein Bowl
steps: Combine rice and beans in bowl.
Squeeze lime and season with salt.

name: Pea Protein Smoothie Bowl
steps: Blend pea protein, banana, almond milk, and spinach.

name: Hemp Seed Oatmeal
steps: Cook oats in almond milk 5 minutes.
Stir in hemp seeds and cinnamon.

name: Soy Glazed Tofu Rice
steps: Press tofu and cut into cubes.
Mix soy sauce, maple syrup, garlic.
Toss tofu in half the marinade.

name: Vegan Protein Pancakes
steps: Mix flax egg: 1 tbsp flax + 3 tbsp water, let sit 5 min.
Add oat flour, protein powder, baking powder, almond milk.

name: Tempeh Buddha Bowl
steps: Roast cubed sweet potato at 425°F for 15 min.
Slice and pan-fry tempeh until golden.
Massage kale with lemon and salt.
Make tahini dressing with lemon and garlic.

name: Miso Edamame Noodles
steps: Whisk miso, sesame oil, and ginger with 2 tbsp water.
Drain noodles and toss with dressing.

name: Seitan Gyros
steps: Season with oregano, salt, and pepper.
Dice cucumber, tomato, and red onion.
Load pita with seitan and vegetables.

name: Shakshuka
steps: Sauté diced onion and bell pepper 5 minutes.
Cover and cook 5-6 minutes. Top with feta.

name: Caprese Frittata
steps: Whisk eggs with salt and pepper.
Add halved tomatoes and cook 2 minutes.

name: Paneer Butter Masala
steps: Cube and pan-fry paneer until golden.
Cook tomato mixture in butter 5 minutes.
Pour in cream and simmer 5 minutes.

name: Cheese and Veggie Quesadilla
steps: Layer cheese, bell pepper, black beans on half.
Cook 2-3 minutes per side until golden.
Serve with sour cream and salsa.

name: Spinach and Ricotta Stuffed Shells
steps: Mix ricotta, chopped spinach, Parmesan, and egg.
Season filling with salt and pepper.
Fill each shell with ricotta mixture.
Top with mozzarella and bake 15 minutes.

name: Greek Salad with Chickpeas
steps: Drizzle with olive oil and season.

name: Vegetable Pad Thai
steps: Mix tamarind, soy sauce, and sugar for sauce.
Top with bean sprouts, peanuts, and green onion.

name: Mushroom Risotto
steps: Add wine and stir until absorbed.
Add broth one ladle at a time, stirring constantly.
Continue until rice is creamy and cooked.
Stir in butter and Parmesan off heat.

name: Sweet Potato Black Bean Tacos
steps: Dice and roast sweet potato at 425°F for 15 min.
Fill tortillas with sweet potato and beans.

name: Halloumi Veggie Skewers
steps: Cut halloumi and vegetables into chunks.
Toss with olive oil and oregano.
Halloumi should be golden and slightly crispy.

name: Lemon Ricotta Pasta
steps: Cook pasta per package, save 1 cup pasta water.
Mix ricotta, lemon zest, lemon juice, Parmesan.
Drain pasta and add to garlic.

name: Vegetarian Chili
steps: Stir well and bring to boil.

name: Egg Fried Rice
steps: Use day-old cold rice for best results.
Add rice and cook 3 minutes, stirring.
Add soy sauce and sesame oil.

name: Baked Feta with Tomatoes
steps: Place feta in small baking dish.
Surround with cherry tomatoes and garlic.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle oregano.
Tomatoes will burst and feta will soften.
Serve with crusty bread for dipping.

name: Saag Paneer
steps: Cube and fry paneer until golden.
Blend spinach with a little water.
Add garam masala and cook 1 minute.
Add paneer and cream, heat through.

name: Avocado Toast with Eggs
steps: Mash avocado with lemon juice and salt.
Fry or poach eggs to your liking.

name: Caprese Sandwich
steps: Season with salt and press together.

name: Hummus and Veggie Plate
steps: Place hummus in center of plate.
Warm pita and cut into triangles.

name: Tuna Salad Lettuce Wraps
steps: Mix tuna, mayo, mustard, and lemon juice.
Fill romaine leaves with tuna salad.

name: Smoked Salmon Bagel
steps: Spread cream cheese on both halves.

name: Overnight Oats
steps: Add splash of milk if too thick.

name: Quesadilla Quick Melt
steps: Layer cheese and jalapeños on half.
Serve with sour cream and salsa.

name: Egg and Cheese Muffin
steps: Top with other half and hot sauce.

name: Chicken Breast with Salsa Verde
steps: Season chicken with cumin, salt, and pepper.
Spoon salsa verde over and garnish with cilantro.

name: Seared Ahi Tuna Salad
steps: Season tuna with salt and pepper.
Sear in very hot pan 60-90 seconds per side.
Drizzle ginger dressing and sesame seeds.

name: Lemon Garlic Shrimp Pasta
steps: Add shrimp, cook 2 minutes per side.
Toss with drained pasta and parsley.

name: Turkey Stuffed Bell Peppers
steps: Brown turkey with onion and garlic.

name: Chicken Piccata
steps: Pound chicken thin and dredge in flour.
Add white wine, lemon juice to pan.

name: Beef Kebabs
steps: Toss with olive oil, garlic, cumin, coriander.

name: Honey Garlic Salmon
steps: Mix honey, garlic, soy sauce, lemon juice.
Flip and brush with honey glaze.

name: Pork Chop with Apple Slaw
steps: Season pork chop with sage, salt, pepper.
Sear in oil 4 minutes per side.
Make slaw with vinegar and mustard.

name: Spicy Tuna Bowl
steps: Top with tuna, avocado, cucumber, soy sauce.

name: Chicken Fajita Bowl
steps: Slice chicken and vegetables into strips.
Set aside and cook peppers and onion.

name: Balsamic Chicken Salad
steps: Season chicken with salt and pepper.
Grill or pan-cook chicken 6-7 min per side.
Crumble goat cheese, add walnuts, drizzle olive oil.

name: Mahi-Mahi Tacos
steps: Season mahi-mahi with salt and cumin.
Cook in pan 4 minutes per side.
Top with mango salsa, chipotle mayo, cilantro.

name: Chicken Gyro Bowl
steps: Marinate chicken in Greek yogurt, oregano, garlic.
Grill or pan-cook 6-7 min per side.
Dice cucumber, tomato, and red onion.
Top with tzatziki and pita chips.

name: Teriyaki Chicken
steps: Mix soy sauce, honey, garlic, ginger, sesame oil.
Cook chicken in pan 5-6 min per side.
Remove chicken and add teriyaki sauce to pan.

name: Shrimp and Grits
steps: Cook grits per package, stir in cheddar.
Add shrimp, cook 2-3 minutes per side.
Top with bacon and hot sauce.

name: Mushroom Shawarma Wrap
steps: Toss with shawarma spices and olive oil.
Cook in pan 4 minutes per side.

name: Vegan Ramen
steps: Cube tofu and add to broth.

name: Cauliflower Fried Rice
steps: Pulse cauliflower to rice-size in food processor.
Add cauliflower rice and cook 4 minutes.
Push to side, scramble eggs or fry tofu.

name: Roasted Chickpea Bowl
steps: Roast chickpeas at 425°F with spices for 20 min.
Drizzle dressing, add pomegranate and mint.

name: Vegan Sushi Bowl
steps: Serve with soy sauce and pickled ginger.

name: Thai Peanut Noodles
steps: Mix peanut butter, soy sauce, lime, sriracha with water.
Garnish with crushed peanuts and cilantro.

name: Lentil Soup
steps: Simmer 15 minutes until lentils are soft.

name: Jackfruit Pulled Tacos
steps: Cook jackfruit in pan, breaking up pieces.
Add BBQ sauce and simmer 5 minutes.

name: Vegan Burrito Bowl
steps: Warm black beans with cumin and garlic.

name: Mango Coconut Chia Pudding
steps: Mix chia seeds with coconut milk.
Stir well and refrigerate 4 hours or overnight.
Sprinkle lime zest and toasted coconut.

name: Falafel Wrap
steps: Pan-fry in oil 3 minutes per side.

name: Greek Lamb Chops
steps: Marinate lamb in olive oil, garlic, lemon, oregano.
Heat grill or pan very hot.
Cook chops 3-4 minutes per side for medium.

name: Chicken Shawarma Bowl
steps: Cook in pan 6-8 minutes per side.
Add chicken and vegetables, drizzle tahini.

name: Tuna Nicoise Salad
steps: Cook tuna: season and sear 2 min per side.

name: Korean Beef Bibimbap
steps: Brown ground beef with garlic and soy sauce.
Mix gochujang sauce with sesame oil.

name: Miso Salmon
steps: Mix miso, mirin, sake, and soy sauce.

name: Vietnamese Pho
steps: Heat beef broth with star anise and cinnamon.
Ladle very hot broth over beef to cook it.
Serve with lime and hoisin on side.

name: Chicken Dumplings
steps: Combine chicken, shredded cabbage, ginger, garlic.
Add soy sauce and sesame oil.
Pan-fry bottom for crispiness if desired.

name: Szechuan Tofu
steps: Cook garlic and ginger in oil.
Add tofu and coat in sauce.

name: Chicken Ramen
steps: Cook chicken in seasoned water, then slice.
Make soy broth with soy sauce, garlic, ginger.
Assemble bowl with broth and noodles.
Top with egg, corn, nori, scallions.

name: Thai Green Curry Chicken
steps: Fry curry paste in pan 1 minute.
Add bamboo shoots and fish sauce.

name: Beef Bulgogi
steps: Blend pear, soy sauce, garlic for marinade.
Cook in hot pan 2-3 minutes per side.
Garnish with sesame oil and scallions.

name: Kimchi Fried Rice
steps: Heat oil in pan over medium-high.
Add soy sauce and sesame oil.
Make well in center, scramble eggs.

name: Eggplant Parmesan
steps: Dip in egg, coat in breadcrumbs.
Layer in baking dish with marinara.

name: Butternut Squash Soup
steps: Stir in coconut milk and nutmeg.

name: Cheese Stuffed Portobello
steps: Fill mushroom caps with ricotta mixture.

name: Veggie Frittata
steps: Whisk eggs with oregano, salt, pepper.

name: Spiced Cauliflower Steaks
steps: Brush with olive oil and ras el hanout.

name: Vegetable Korma
steps: Blend cashews with a little water.
Add korma paste to onion, cook 2 minutes.

name: Tofu Banh Mi Bowl
steps: Make quick pickles with daikon and carrot.

name: Protein Chia Pudding
steps: Mix chia seeds with almond milk.
Add protein powder, cocoa, and honey.

name: Hard Boiled Egg Snack Box
steps: Place eggs in cold water and bring to boil.

name: Edamame with Sea Salt
steps: Add chili flakes and garlic powder.
Serve with extra sea salt on side.

name: Turkey Rollups
steps: Spread thin layer of cream cheese.
Roll tightly and secure with toothpick.

name: Deviled Eggs
steps: Mix yolks with mayo, mustard, vinegar.

name: Chicken Enchiladas
steps: Mix shredded chicken with black beans.
Roll and place seam-down in baking dish.

name: Seared Duck Breast
steps: Score duck skin in crosshatch pattern.
Place skin-side down in cold pan.
Render fat over medium heat 10 minutes.
Deglaze pan with orange juice and honey.

name: Chicken Shawarma Flatbread
steps: Cook in pan 6-8 minutes per side.

name: Prawn Cocktail Bowl
steps: Squeeze lemon and dust with paprika.

name: Chicken and Sweet Potato Hash
steps: Dice sweet potato and microwave 4 minutes.
Dice chicken, onion, and bell pepper.

name: Peruvian Lomo Saltado
steps: Marinate with soy sauce and aji paste.
Toss until onions are slightly wilted.

name: Chicken Souvlaki Plate
steps: Cube chicken and marinate in olive oil, lemon, oregano, garlic.

name: Japanese Chicken Katsu
steps: Coat in flour, egg, then panko.
Pan-fry in oil 4 minutes per side.
Serve over rice with shredded cabbage.

name: Mexican Birria Tacos
steps: Blend soaked ancho chilies with garlic and spices.
Simmer beef in chili broth 15 minutes.

name: Moroccan Chicken Tagine
steps: Serve chicken and sauce over couscous.

name: Brazilian Feijoada
steps: Cook bacon and sausage in pot.
Serve with orange slices and collard greens on side.

name: Turkish Adana Kebab
steps: Mix lamb with spices and garlic.
Slice onions thin and toss with sumac.
Top with sumac onions and parsley.

name: Filipino Chicken Adobo
steps: Combine soy sauce, vinegar, garlic, bay leaves.
Cook marinade and chicken over medium heat.
Uncover and cook until sauce thickens.

name: Ethiopian Doro Wat
steps: Cook onions in butter until very dark, 10 minutes.

name: Meal Prep Chicken Bowls
steps: Dice sweet potato, toss with oil and paprika.
Roast sweet potato at 425°F for 15 min.

name: Sheet Pan Sausage and Veggies
steps: Toss everything with olive oil and seasoning.

name: Slow Cooker Beef Stew
steps: Mix broth and tomato paste, pour over.
Cook on high 4 hours or low 8 hours.

name: Protein French Toast
steps: Whisk eggs, protein powder, almond milk, cinnamon.
Cook in buttered pan 3 min per side.

name: Smoked Salmon Scrambled Eggs
steps: Fold in smoked salmon, dill, capers.

name: High Protein Waffles
steps: Mix oat flour, protein powder, baking powder.

name: Breakfast Burrito
steps: Add black beans and heat through.

name: Soy Protein Stir Fry
steps: Rehydrate soy protein in hot water.
Add soy sauce and sesame oil.

name: Vegan Protein Burrito
steps: Top with guacamole and salsa, roll.

name: Seitan Schnitzel
steps: Slice seitan thin and pound flat.
Pan-fry in oil 3-4 minutes per side.

name: Tofu Tikka Masala
steps: Simmer 8 minutes and serve over rice.

name: Hemp Protein Smoothie
steps: Add more almond milk if too thick.

name: Chicken Parm
steps: Pound chicken and bread with flour, egg, breadcrumbs.

name: Chicken Caesar Salad
steps: Season and grill chicken 6-7 min per side.
Slice chicken and place on salad.

name: Steak Salad
steps: Season steak and cook 4-5 min per side.
Crumble blue cheese and drizzle dressing.

name: Egg Drop Soup
steps: Bring broth to boil with ginger.
Add to broth and stir until thickened.
Slowly drizzle eggs into simmering soup.
Add soy sauce and sesame oil.

name: Chicken Lettuce Cups
steps: Add hoisin sauce and water chestnuts.
Fill each cup with chicken mixture.

name: Tuscan White Bean Chicken
steps: Season and cook chicken 6 min per side.
Return chicken and top with Parmesan.

name: Spiced Lamb Meatballs
steps: Mix lamb with cumin, coriander, garlic, egg, breadcrumbs.
Make yogurt sauce with garlic and mint.

name: Chicken Congee
steps: Add soy sauce and white pepper.
Top with scallions and sesame oil.

name: Chicken Pesto Wrap
steps: Cook chicken in pan 6-7 min per side.

name: Spaghetti Bolognese
steps: Brown beef with onion and garlic.

name: Shrimp Fried Rice
steps: Add soy sauce and sesame oil.

name: Salmon Avocado Bowl
steps: Assemble bowl with rice as base.
Add all toppings, soy sauce, and ginger.

name: Greek Chicken Soup
steps: Temper egg mixture with hot broth.

name: Chicken Florentine
steps: Return chicken and serve over pasta.

name: Beef and Lentil Soup
steps: Add onion and carrots, cook 3 minutes.

name: Chicken Souvlaki Pita
steps: Cube chicken, marinate in lemon, oregano, garlic.

name: Thai Basil Beef
steps: Cook garlic and chili in hot oil.
Add fish sauce and oyster sauce.

name: Chicken and Mushroom Pasta
steps: Set aside and cook mushrooms with garlic.

name: Chicken Fried Rice
steps: Dice and cook chicken in oil.

name: Halibut with Mango Salsa
steps: Season halibut with salt and pepper.
Pan-sear in olive oil 4-5 min per side.
Mix with lime juice and cilantro.
Serve with mango salsa on top.

name: Shakshuka with Feta
steps: Top with feta and serve with pita.

name: Beef Stroganoff
steps: Sear beef strips 2 min per side.
Add beef back, serve over noodles.

name: Chicken Burrito Bowl
steps: Season chicken and cook in pan.
Top with salsa, sour cream, cheese.

name: Pork Fried Rice
steps: Season with soy sauce and sesame oil.

name: Vegan Seitan Burger
steps: Cook seitan patty 4 minutes per side.
Add vegan cheese to patty last minute.
Layer lettuce, tomato, onion on bun.

name: Chicken Orzo Soup
steps: Return chicken, add lemon and parsley.

name: Lamb Kofta
steps: Mix lamb with grated onion, cumin, coriander, garlic.
Serve kofta on bread with sauce.

name: Seafood Paella
steps: Heat olive oil in wide pan.

name: Tuna Melt
steps: Drain tuna and mix with mayo, mustard, celery, lemon.
Broil until cheese melts and bubbles.

name: Smoky Chicken and Rice
steps: Remove and sauté onion and garlic.

name: Beef Tacos al Pastor
steps: Cook in pan with pineapple chunks.

name: Grilled Swordfish
steps: Brush swordfish with olive oil and garlic.
Make quick sauce with tomatoes, capers, lemon.

name: Pesto Chicken Flatbread
steps: Cook chicken in pan 6-7 min per side.
Top with arugula and balsamic glaze.

name: Lemon Herb Chicken
steps: Mix lemon zest, juice, garlic, thyme, rosemary, olive oil.
Cook in pan 6-7 min per side.

name: Crab Cakes
steps: Combine crab, mayo, egg, mustard, Old Bay.
Add just enough breadcrumbs to bind.
Pan-fry in oil 3-4 minutes per side.

name: Black Bean Soup
steps: Add lime juice, serve with sour cream.

name: Chicken Tortilla Soup
steps: Serve topped with crushed tortilla chips.

name: Chicken Gyros
steps: Marinate chicken in yogurt, lemon, oregano, garlic.
Grill or cook in pan 6-8 min per side.
Top with tomato, onion, and fries.

name: Tempeh Stir Fry
steps: Add soy sauce and sesame oil.

name: Protein-Packed Veggie Bowl
steps: Sprinkle hemp seeds and nutritional yeast.

name: Grilled Chicken and Vegetable Plate
steps: Toss vegetables in olive oil and Italian seasoning.
